scripts.check:harness: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run && npm run build && python scripts/check_docs_drift.py && python scripts/check_structure.py

_notes: Merge only the scripts your project needs into package.json.
typecheck uses vue-tsc instead of tsc to handle .vue file types correctly.
'--run' flag exits Vitest after one pass (no watch mode).
check:unused requires knip (npm install -D knip) to detect dead exports and files.
